mapper.insert: INSERT INTO drone ( drone_name, drone_model, manufacturer, serial_number, drone_type, weight, max_altitude, max_speed, endurance, range_, camera_type, payload_capacity, battery_capacity, status, purchase_date, description, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{droneName}, #{droneModel}, #{manufacturer}, #{serialNumber}, #{droneType}, #{weight}, #{maxAltitude}, #{maxSpeed}, #{endurance}, #{range}, #{cameraType}, #{payloadCapacity}, #{batteryCapacity}, #{status}, #{purchaseDate}, #{description}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.update: UPDATE drone SET drone_name = #{droneName}, drone_model = #{droneModel}, manufacturer = #{manufacturer}, serial_number = #{serialNumber}, drone_type = #{droneType}, weight = #{weight}, max_altitude = #{maxAltitude}, max_speed = #{maxSpeed}, endurance = #{endurance}, range_ = #{range}, camera_type = #{cameraType}, payload_capacity = #{payloadCapacity}, battery_capacity = #{batteryCapacity}, status = #{status}, purchase_date = #{purchaseDate}, description = #{description}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM drone
AND drone_name LIKE '%' || #{droneName} || '%'
AND drone_model LIKE '%' || #{droneModel} || '%'
AND status = #{status}
SELECT * FROM drone ORDER BY id DESC
